summary: Reflective blog post by Carole Herder on lessons horses teach riders, focused on patience, including a friend's story about a dominant gelding named JonJo.
Carole Herder essay on anthropomorphism and whether horses feel emotions like jealousy, illustrated with a story about a borrowed lesson horse.
Carole Herder recap of Team Cavallo's annual trip to the Spoga trade show in Germany, meeting worldwide hoof-boot distributors.
Blog post highlighting barefoot/booted horse events including the Man versus Horse Marathon in Wales and TREC championships, featuring riders using Cavallo boots.
Carole Herder article on how every horse's hooves differ, using a story of a friend's barefoot horse whose hooves cracked after diet changes.
List of fun Halloween-themed horse facts and folklore, covering the Puca shape shifter, the Headless Horseman, Epona, and horse superstitions.
Carole Herder opinion piece weighing the pros and cons of blanketing horses for cold weather and how horses naturally regulate temperature.
Carole Herder travel essay comparing African wildebeest and zebra herd behavior to domestic horses, observed on safari in Kenya's Mara North Conservancy.
Customer testimonial about a 28-year-old TB mare with bad feet returning to regular riding thanks to Cavallo Simple Boots.
Educational post explaining White Line Disease (Seedy Toe) in horse hooves, its bacterial/fungal causes, prevalence, and treatment.
Carole Herder piece on fixing saddle-fit problems, contrasting two horses' backs and listing the benefits of Cavallo memory-foam saddle pads.
Customer story about a 14-year-old laminitic quarter horse using Cavallo Simple Boots over metal shoes for a 6-mile benefit trail ride.
